/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/edge-daemon.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/edge-daemon.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o edge-daemon  libcore_lib.a -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
